title: senecio racemosus
intro: Senecio racemosus, also known as the Fireweed or Thread Plant, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio racemosus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by drying and steeping its leaves and flowers, or used in tincture form, although its use should be limited due to potential toxicity.
